title: マイルCS南部杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, I've been thinking that running both the turf
and dirt Mile Championships is the perfect move
for a true all-rounder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Which is why I'm miles from home, visiting Morioka! Get it? Miles. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And would you believe my luck? I run into
Morioka's very own Yukino! She's offered me her
precious support, so now I've gotta put on a good
show for her!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Will I manage to gain victory and chat with the
locals without suffering any communication
barriers?! Find out next time! ☆
